lastRunSummary: Built Game 08: Dust Devil — physics tumbleweed through canyon gaps, 14 tests pass.

currentTask.context: Director session starting - reading feedback and deciding next action

gameQueue.title: Wanted Poster
gameQueue.concept: Memory/deduction game: study a wanted poster, then identify the outlaw in a saloon crowd before time runs out. Procedurally generated faces.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: Cognitive mechanic (first non-physical challenge in the series), procedural face generation, crowd NPC behavior

gameQueue.title: Gold Rush
gameQueue.concept: Resource management + survival: mine for gold in a procedural cave, manage lantern fuel and pickaxe durability, escape before the tunnel collapses.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First inventory/resource system, procedural dungeon generation, dual resource timers creating layered urgency

gameQueue.title: Boot Hill Bluff
gameQueue.concept: Turn-based poker-style bluffing duel against an AI outlaw: read tells, bet chips, and call their bluff or fold. Text-driven narrative choices between hands.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First turn-based game, first narrative choice system, AI bluffing behavior — completely different genre from all prior games

runLog.summary: Built Game 06: Cattle Drive (cattle-drive.html). Flocking AI, wolf predators, 13 tests pass.
Built Game 07: Tin Star Showdown (tin-star-showdown.html). Quick-draw duel, best-of-3, AI difficulty scaling, 13 tests pass.
Built Game 08: Dust Devil (dust-devil.html). 2-axis physics tumbleweed, tap-to-gust canyon navigation, 14 tests pass.
